spec_match.rationale: The replay runs PaymentRequest.show() through the real handler for success, AbortError, and OperationError cases, with additional real probes for unsupported methods and missing activation.

interactive.rationale: Every scenario button invokes browser code, updates the trace, records outcome counters, writes a verdict banner, and surfaces raw and parsed error-message data.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now lists the expanded replay scenarios, including unsupported method and missing activation.

edge_cases.rationale: The page includes the pre-Chrome-149 collapse toggle, all OperationError variants, NotSupportedError and SecurityError fall-through probes, and raw err.message parsing.

design_system.rationale: The verdict and trace indicators use inline SVG icons and shared CSS variables rather than raw hex colors or glyph-state icons.

summary: The log replay now exercises the complete decision surface from real browser results and makes the before/after error-name distinction visible without relying on glyph icons.
